payload.answer: The statement indicates a read-only SQL constraint for admin mode: "SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10" is allowed, while "DELETE FROM memory_cards" is denied. No durable memory should be written from this input.
citations: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes a transient admin/debug access rule, not a durable personal fact to commit to memory.

details: Parsed the input as a permissions/debug statement.
Identified allowed operation: SELECT on memory_cards.
Identified denied operation: DELETE on memory_cards.
Chose not to create memory cards because the content is operational policy, not durable personal memory.

repair_options: Use only SELECT queries while in select-only mode.
Do not attempt DELETE statements against memory_cards.
If write access is needed, switch to an authorized non-read-only mode.
